recent_calls.summary: The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user did not respond before hanging up.

The user called to request a repair service for their water heater due to no hot water. The agent provided available appointment slots for June 1st and 2nd, but the user insisted on a same-day appointment, which was not available. The call ended without scheduling an appointment.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.
The user returned a call they had received earlier and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to inquire about purchasing a warranty for their AC units under Budget warranty. The agent gathered initial information and then transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user called Budget for service assistance in Illinois and requested to speak with a representative. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Oraine called Budget to request service for a non-working upstairs central air conditioning unit, referred by American Home Shield. The agent collected necessary details, confirmed the request, and informed Oraine that someone from Budget would contact her soon. Oraine expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

Aaron called to report that the air conditioning at his rental property in Hazelwood stopped working last night, causing a comfort issue for tenants. He requested the soonest available service appointment, and a provisional booking was made for Monday, June 1st at 10 AM. The agent confirmed the details and informed Aaron about the dispatch fee, and the call ended with Aaron declining to provide feedback.

The user called to confirm if their voicemail regarding an expedited dispatch request was received. The agent acknowledged the dispatch number and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance with the expedited service.

Sheryl from American Home Shield called to request expedited air conditioning service at 29 Grimmer Avenue, Edwardsville, due to a health condition of the resident's mother. The agent confirmed all details, including contact information and urgency, and informed Sheryl that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out shortly. Sheryl declined additional information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback on the call experience.

The user called to set up a cooling service request because their AC unit is completely out. The agent collected the user's name, address, phone number, and preferred service time, and confirmed the details before ending the call. The user declined to provide an email for updates.

The user reported a heating and cooling unit not cooling in room twelve at the Center For Autism and provided the correct service address. The agent confirmed the details and scheduled a service follow-up for the next business day. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Mitch Ludluff, requested a quote for a new HVAC system due to a refrigerant leak in their 25-year-old unit. The agent collected the user's contact information and service address, and confirmed that the user wants service as soon as possible. The agent informed Mitch that the team will reach out the next business day to confirm availability.

The user called to clarify conflicting appointment emails about visits scheduled for the evening and June third. The agent acknowledged the confusion, documented the concern, and assured the user that the team would review and follow up the next business day. The user confirmed availability for the evening visit if it is confirmed and requested a text or call when the visitor is on the way.

The user called Budget after hours, confused about the office hours, and questioned if the agent was a real person. The agent explained the after-hours support and offered to take the user's information for a follow-up on the next business day, but the call ended shortly after without further details.
The call was an inbound after-hours call where the agent, Evie, greeted the user Hannah and asked if she needed assistance or a follow-up. The user did not respond, and the call ended shortly after.

Danny from American Home Shield called to request an expedited service dispatch for an urgent air conditioning issue related to a health concern. The agent documented the request, escalated it for next business day follow-up, and confirmed callback details. The user requested a callback within thirty minutes if the work order could be accepted on an expedited basis.

The user called after hours requesting to speak with a live representative. The agent informed the user that live representatives were unavailable but offered to take their information for a follow-up on the next business day.

The user called to inquire about the service charge for an AC unit. The agent explained that exact pricing was not available but offered to have the team contact the user with details and promotions. The user declined to leave contact information, and the call ended without further action.

The user, Tina, called to reschedule an appointment she could not attend at the originally scheduled time. The agent informed her that live transfers were unavailable after 4 PM but documented her request and assured a representative would contact her on the next business day to confirm the new appointment. Tina provided a preferred time frame of next week and ended the call after confirming no further assistance was needed.

Danny from American Home Shield called to inquire about accepting a work order on an expedited basis. The agent asked if the request was an emergency or could be handled during a regular appointment, but the call ended shortly after without further information.

Mary called to inquire about how to pay for the Savings Club membership after approving the estimate online. The agent explained the payment process and offered to have the team follow up with a payment link, which Mary accepted. The call ended with the agent confirming the follow-up and offering further assistance if needed.

Julie called Budget's after-hours service to follow up on an appointment request for her air conditioner made earlier that morning, as she had not received a callback. The agent apologized for the delay, documented her request, and informed her that a team member would contact her on the next business day. Julie also inquired about Saturday hours, which the agent provided.
The user called and requested to speak with a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent successfully.
The user requested to be transferred to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another number.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

Vanessa from the escalations team of American Home Shield called and requested to be transferred to a live agent. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to another live agent.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect them with a live representative. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed a successful call transfer.
The user called and requested to speak with a live agent. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to another agent successfully.

The user called to inquire about scheduling a technician to look at their air conditioner under their homeowner's warranty with American Home Shield. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist with technician scheduling and dispatch details.
The call was very brief and the agent attempted to engage the user by offering assistance with heating, cooling, or plumbing services, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another representative. The call ended with a successful transfer without further conversation.

The user, Tina McAfee, called to inquire about a scheduled service appointment for today at her address. The agent confirmed the user's details but found no appointment scheduled and offered to transfer her to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was successfully transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called Budget and provided their ZIP code 62025 in Illinois. The user was unclear about the service needed and requested to speak to a live person. The agent transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about an estimate sent last year and requested to speak with a live person. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent. The call lasted 30 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect them with a live representative. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user called to ask questions about an estimate related to an instrument received from Gigi. The agent offered to explain the options, but the user had difficulty reading and requested a callback from Gigi for further assistance. The call was then transferred to a live agent for follow-up.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed a successful call transfer.

Sam from American Home Show called Budget to request immediate service for a property and inquire about an extra charge on the homeowner's bill. The agent confirmed the nature of the request and transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called Budget and provided their ZIP code 63376. They requested to speak with a live person, and the agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully.
The user called to inquire if a technician had visited a specific address. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative immediately without providing any information. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
